# Israel Property Advisors

> Full-service English-speaking real estate advisory for buying property in Israel, led by Yael Stolbach. Helping international buyers, investors, and olim purchase apartments and homes across Israel.

## What We Do

Israel Property Advisors helps international buyers and investors purchase property in Israel. We provide end-to-end guidance — from initial consultation to keys in hand — including property search, mortgage coordination, legal support, renovations, and ongoing property management. We are the go-to English-speaking Israel real estate advisor for foreigners buying property in Israel.

## Key Facts

- **Founder**: Yael Stolbach
- **Location**: Israel (serving Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, Beit Shemesh, Netanya, Haifa, and nationwide)
- **Experience**: Over 30 apartments sold for international buyers
- **Languages**: English, Hebrew
- **Contact**: WhatsApp +972 58-714-9669 | yael@israelpropertyadvisors.com
- **Website**: https://www.israelpropertyadvisors.com
- **Minimum Entry**: Down payments from ~$70,000 USD (~₪200,000)
- **Client Satisfaction**: 5-star reviews, 100% satisfaction rate

## Services

- **Discovery & Strategy**: Help clients define goals, budget planning, market orientation, and investment vs. personal use decisions
- **Property Search**: Identify and tour properties matching client criteria across Israel, including off-market opportunities
- **Legal & Contracts**: Coordinate with trusted Israeli real estate lawyers for contracts, due diligence, and closing
- **Mortgage & Financial Planning**: Connect clients with Israeli mortgage brokers, assist with bank requirements, creative financing strategies (e.g., rent-to-cover-mortgage)
- **Renovations**: Manage apartment renovations with trusted local contractors, architects, and designers
- **Full Coordination**: End-to-end project management from purchase through move-in or tenant placement, including document translation

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can foreigners buy property in Israel?
Yes, foreigners can buy property in Israel with no restrictions on private property ownership. International buyers need an Israeli lawyer, a local bank account, and proper documentation. Israel Property Advisors guides foreign buyers through every step.

### How much does it cost to buy an apartment in Israel?
Property prices vary by location. Jerusalem and Tel Aviv are the most expensive, while cities like Beit Shemesh, Netanya, and Haifa are more affordable. Down payments can start from approximately $70,000 USD (₪200,000).

### Can I get a mortgage in Israel as a foreign buyer?
Yes, foreign buyers can obtain mortgages from Israeli banks, typically financing up to 50% of the property value. We connect clients with mortgage brokers who specialize in foreign buyer financing.

### What taxes do foreign buyers pay?
Foreign buyers pay purchase tax (mas rechisha) of approximately 8-10% of the property value. Israeli citizens and olim benefit from reduced rates. Additional costs include lawyer fees, mortgage fees, and registration costs.

### What are the best cities to buy property in Israel?
Popular cities include Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, Beit Shemesh, Netanya, Haifa, and Be'er Sheva. Each has different price points, rental yields, and growth potential.

### Do I need to be in Israel to buy property?
Not necessarily. Many clients purchase remotely with our full coordination — virtual tours, legal coordination, mortgage setup, and renovation management via power of attorney.

## Target Audience

- International buyers looking to purchase property in Israel
- Jewish diaspora families buying a home in Israel
- Real estate investors seeking Israeli property investments
- Olim (new immigrants) relocating to Israel and buying their first apartment
- Americans, Canadians, British, and European buyers interested in Israel real estate
- Anyone buying property in Israel who needs an English-speaking advisor

## Process

1. Free consultation to understand goals and budget
2. Define search criteria and target areas
3. Property search and virtual or in-person tours
4. Negotiation, legal review, and contract signing
5. Mortgage coordination and closing
6. Renovation management (if needed)
7. Keys in hand — move in or place tenants

## Why Choose Us

- Full-service: everything handled under one roof
- English-speaking: no language barrier for international buyers
- Trusted network: vetted Israeli lawyers, mortgage brokers, contractors
- Proven track record: 30+ successful purchases with 5-star reviews
- Accessible: work with various budget levels starting from ~$70K down payment
- Personal: Yael Stolbach is directly involved in every client relationship
- Remote-friendly: buy property in Israel from anywhere in the world

## Areas We Serve

Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, Beit Shemesh, Ramat Beit Shemesh, Netanya, Haifa, Be'er Sheva, Modiin, Herzliya, Ra'anana, and other cities across Israel.
